name: Cyran Olaxisys
description: Cyran was an Orphan who was taken in by a Rem, the former captain of the Knights of Anthor who serve the Emperor. Despite the rough childhood he had fending for himself, Cyran was generally good natured. He served his country with great happiness until he was framed as a traitor as means to keep him contesting the royal family
creator: Aikursoul
